meta.source: YM.c.0 (E-mini Dow Jones, 10y, 2016-01-04…2026-05-11) + NQ (SMT partner, primary)

variants.be_50: MFE>=50% TP-dist arms BE; bar touching entry exits flat
variants.tp1_be: MFE>=50% closes half at +50% TP-dist AND moves stop to BE on remainder

smt.true: NQ took its OPPOSITE-side pre-news liquidity (YM short → NQ low<pre_low; YM long → NQ high>pre_high)
